title: Call to workbook.commit() never resolving or rejecting
author: stephen-h1

comments.author: windmemory
comments.body:
@stephen-h1  I've encountered the same issue today, and I found out that it was because the file path I passed into it was wrong. 
If you attach an error listener below: https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/blob/860b862d122c2645f8b34f0f885a64b104f7a538/lib/stream/xlsx/workbook-writer.js#L58
Just after the `this.stream` is created, you might see errors.

Not sure this is the same problem as yours, but you could at least give it a try.

comments.author: stephen-h1
comments.body: @windmemory thx for the follow up. turned out this was because we had a *really* long file name. seems like some file handling errors must be getting swallowed somewhere
